title: New Research Grant Awarded
content: Our group has received a major research grant from the National Science Foundation to study single-atom catalysts.

title: Paper Published in Nature Communications
content: Our latest work on high-entropy alloy electrocatalysts is now available online. Congratulations to the team!

title: 欢迎新博士生加入
content: 我们很高兴欢迎三位新博士生加入我们这个学期。期待你们的精彩工作！
